# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability
If you discover a security issue in this repository, please open an issue with the `security` label or contact the maintainers directly.

## Supported versions
This project uses Node.js 20 and the latest stable Next.js. Keep dependencies up to date and do not use unsupported or end-of-life packages.

## Disclosure process
Please allow reasonable time for maintainers to review and respond before publicly disclosing any issue.
